title: The Ultimate Tardis Modpack
description: The ULTIMATE Tardis experience! (so long as your favorite base tardis mod is Tardis Refined)
body:
_The **ULTIMATE*** Tardis experience!_  
*so long as your favorite base tardis mod is _Tardis Refined_

This modpack works surprisingly great in multiplayer, so i added a couple mods to aid in multiplayer ease.

(this pack was _originally_ created to ease distribution among my friends privately, but i feel others could do well with this modpack, so here i am, writing this, and here you are, reading it)


Mod list:

- https://modrinth.com/mod/triadtech
- https://modrinth.com/mod/extrashells
- https://modrinth.com/mod/weeping-angels
- https://modrinth.com/mod/doctor-who-deco
